category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a beautiful and reliable typst code formatter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is typstyle; source_facts.homepage points to the official typstyle site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Typstyle documentation site hosted by the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is intentionally not reassessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Typst code formatter; source_facts.executables lists typstyle; source_facts.repo is under the typstyle-rs project.
